tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: List active cities ordered by POI count, with coordinates and Wikidata QID. Paginate with limit/offset; filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

tools.name: get_city
tools.description: Get one city by slug, including POI count, top distinctive tags, top categories, and a sample of its top POIs.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: List every country that has at least one active city, with city and POI counts.

tools.name: get_country
tools.description: Get one country by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code, including its active cities (top 100 by POI count).

tools.name: search_pois
tools.description: Free-text POI search with prefix/tag/fuzzy ranking plus popularity and geo boosts. Provide `q` (free text, min 2 chars) and/or `city` (slug); with both, the search is scoped to that city. Optionally narrow with `tags` (a POI must carry all of them). At least one of `q` or `city` is required.

tools.name: get_poi_details
tools.description: Get one POI by UUID or slug, with full enrichment: coordinates, approved tags, categories, Wikidata/OSM/Google identifiers, and hero image.

tools.name: find_similar_pois
tools.description: Find the nearest POIs to the given one by tag-cosine similarity (shared distinctive tags) — 'more like this'. Empty when the POI has only generic tags.
